query: 分析易方达主动权益业务画像，包括规模结构和头部基金

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE fund_code LIKE 'EF%' AND date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) LIMIT 200) SELECT fund_code AS 基金代码, fund_name AS 基金名称, fund_company AS 基金公司, asset_type AS 资产类型, fund_size / 100000000 AS 规模(亿), (SELECT ROUND(SUM(portfolio_return * 100), 2) FROM fund_performance WHERE fund_code = latest_size.fund_code AND period = '本年以来') AS 年度收益率 FROM latest_size LIMIT 200

plan.rationale: 查询筛选基金代码以'EF'开头的最新规模数据，关联业绩表计算本年度收益率，展示基金基本信息和收益情况

notes: 未指定日期，fund_size 使用最新日期，fund_holding 使用最新日期，业绩区间默认为'本年以来'
查询获取符合条件的基金的规模结构和年度收益率，包含基金基本信息和业绩表现，限制返回200条
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。

metadata.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) AND fund_code LIKE 'EF%' LIMIT 200), top_funds AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size FROM latest_size), performance AS (SELECT fund_code, ROUND(SUM(portfolio_return * 100), 2) AS 年度收益率 FROM fund_performance WHERE period = '本年以来' GROUP BY fund_code) SELECT t.fund_code AS "基金代码", t.fund_name AS "基金名称", t.fund_company AS "基金公司", t.asset_type AS "资产类型", t.fund_size AS "规模(亿)", p.年度收益率 AS "年度收益率" FROM top_funds t LEFT JOIN performance p ON t.fund_code = p.fund_code LIMIT 200

args.sql: WITH latest_size AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size, date FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT MAX(date) FROM fund_size) AND fund_code LIKE 'EF%' LIMIT 200), top_funds AS (SELECT fund_code, fund_name, fund_company, asset_type, fund_size FROM latest_size), performance AS (SELECT fund_code, ROUND(SUM(portfolio_return * 100), 2) AS 年度收益率 FROM fund_performance WHERE period = '本年以来' GROUP BY fund_code) SELECT t.fund_code AS "基金代码", t.fund_name AS "基金名称", t.fund_company AS "基金公司", t.asset_type AS "资产类型", t.fund_size AS "规模(亿)", p.年度收益率 AS "年度收益率" FROM top_funds t LEFT JOIN performance p ON t.fund_code = p.fund_code LIMIT 200
